name: laboria-full-stack
description: Laboria - Portal de Empleo y Formación Profesional (Full Stack)

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build:backend
scripts.deploy: npm run build:frontend && npm run deploy:backend
scripts.deploy:backend: cd backend && echo 'Deploy backend to Railway/Vercel'
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && echo 'Deploy frontend to GitHub Pages'

author: Damian Moares
